UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents an administrator's profile in the system.

name.description: The full name of the user.

isAuthorized.description: Whether the user is authorized to access the admin dashboard.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

School.title: School
School.description: Represents a school using the SmartSApp onboarding platform.

name.description: The full name of the school.

slug.description: The dynamically generated page name for the school (e.g., 'ghana-international-school').

heroImageUrl.description: URL of the hero image for the meeting page.

Meeting.title: Meeting
Meeting.description: Represents a scheduled meeting for a school.

schoolId.description: The ID of the school this meeting is for.

schoolName.description: The name of the school this meeting is for.

schoolSlug.description: The slug of the school for generating the meeting page URL.

meetingTime.description: The date and time of the meeting.

recordingUrl.description: URL of the meeting recording (e.g., YouTube).

brochureUrl.description: URL of the school's brochure document.

MediaAsset.title: Media Asset
MediaAsset.description: Represents a media file (image, video, audio, document) or a link in the library.

name.description: The name of the media asset or link.

url.description: The public URL of the asset or link.

fullPath.description: The full path to the file within Firebase Storage (e.g., 'media/image/file.png'). Not applicable for links.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the file (e.g., 'image/png'). Not applicable for links.

size.description: The file size in bytes. Not applicable for links.

uploadedBy.description: The UID of the user who uploaded the asset.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the asset was uploaded.

linkTitle.description: The title of the webpage for a link asset.

linkDescription.description: The description of the webpage for a link asset.

previewImageUrl.description: The URL of a preview image for a link asset.

SurveyQuestion.title: Survey Question
SurveyQuestion.description: Represents a single question within a survey.

id.description: Unique identifier for the question within the survey.

options.description: A list of options for multiple-choice, checkbox, or dropdown questions.

allowOther.description: Whether to allow a free-text 'Other' option for checkboxes.

isRequired.description: Whether the question must be answered. Can be overridden by logic blocks.

hidden.description: Whether the question is hidden by default. Can be overridden by logic blocks.

defaultValue.description: The default value for the question.

minLength.description: Minimum character length for text-based answers.

maxLength.description: Maximum character length for text-based answers.

enableScoring.description: Whether scoring is enabled for this question.

optionScores.description: Scores corresponding to each option for multiple-choice, checkbox, or dropdown questions.

SurveyLayoutBlock.title: Survey Layout Block
SurveyLayoutBlock.description: Represents a non-interactive layout element within a survey form.

id.description: Unique identifier for the layout block.

title.description: Content for a heading or section block.

url.description: URL for image, video, audio, or document blocks.

html.description: HTML content for an embed block.

hidden.description: Whether the block is hidden by default. Can be overridden by logic blocks.

description.description: Optional descriptive text for a section block.

renderAsPage.description: If true, the section and its contents will be rendered as a separate page.

SurveyLogicBlock.title: Survey Logic Block
SurveyLogicBlock.description: Represents a conditional logic block in a survey.

rules.description: A list of conditional rules to evaluate.

targetElementId.description: The ID of the target element for 'jump' actions.

targetElementIds.description: A list of target element IDs for 'require', 'show', or 'hide' actions.

Survey.title: Survey
Survey.description: Represents a survey with questions and layout blocks.

description.description: Instructions or description for the survey.

slug.description: URL-friendly slug for the survey page.

bannerImageUrl.description: URL for the survey's banner image.

status.description: The current status of the survey.

elements.description: An ordered list of questions and layout blocks in the survey.

thankYouTitle.description: Title for the 'Thank You' page shown after submission.

SurveyResponse.title: Survey Response
SurveyResponse.description: Represents a single submission for a survey.

surveyId.description: The ID of the survey being responded to.

value.description: The answer value. Can be a string, array of strings, number, or object.

SurveySummary.title: Survey Summary
SurveySummary.description: Represents an AI-generated summary of a survey's results.

summary.description: The AI-generated summary content in Markdown format.

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the summary was generated.

prompt.description: The user-provided prompt for this specific summary, if any.

definition.description: Stores user profile information for administrators.
Stores school data. Each document represents a school using the SmartSApp onboarding platform.
Stores meeting data for schools. Each document represents a specific meeting.
Stores all media assets uploaded to the application.
Stores individual surveys, including their questions and configuration.
Stores user responses for a specific survey.
Stores AI-generated summaries for a specific survey.
